title: Buggy Pickaxe
description: Inspired by the Bara Bara Fruit, this pickaxe lets you mine from a distance - up to 32 blocks (or infinity with gamerule)! Based on Buggy the Star Clown (One Piece).
body:
# Buggy Pickaxe

![buggy pickaxe](https://i.ibb.co/VYkg5GY4/eewtggd.gif)

Unleash the power of the legendary Buggy the Star Clown (from One Piece)! This mod adds the incredible Buggy Pickaxe, allowing you to break blocks (instantly) at an impressive distance of up to 32 blocks (or infinity with gamerule "buggyreachdistance")!

## How It Works

**1. Golem's Nose**
Use shears on an Iron Golem to steal its nose! The poor thing will be left noseless and drop the essential item on the ground.
It becomes so sad that it will no longer fight back against attacks and its health will decrease ( 50❤ > 40❤ ).

**2. Paint it Red**
The iron nose is boring. Paint it with red dye to turn it into a classic Clown Nose, worthy of the great Captain Buggy.

**3. Make the Hat**
Craft Buggy's iconic hat with leather and dyes. (Equippable on your head).
And it can be used in the Buggy Pickaxe recipe.

![Hat](https://i.ibb.co/tp6gZn2Y/36fe93e0-3f07-4b65-b47a-3390f7ad08a1.png)

## Usage Animation

See the Buggy Pickaxe in action! The animation shows how it breaks blocks at an incredible distance of up to 32 blocks, saving you time and effort.

![Buggy pickaxe animation](https://i.ibb.co/PscPSYJF/sfgsdgsdg.gif)

## Crafting Recipes

![Recipe 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc2ad5a846adbf34c1708c2a9b69627a1e524c6a.png)

![Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad63f8aeb6b26d48beef52cf5224564dd3a51a5e.png)

![Recipe 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ae455cdfff76010fb09269edfea91e39ffce4ba.png)

## Important

**GeckoLib**
This mod requires the GeckoLib API installed to function correctly. It is an essential animation engine to ensure the tool's movements and visuals work perfectly in the game.
[[Download GeckoLib]](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Known Bugs

Currently, a bug exists where you can incorrectly place blocks if you attempt to use the Buggy Pickaxe while holding blocks in your off-hand. A fix is planned for upcoming updates!
